title: Smartproxy API Structure
description: Hierarchical structure of the Smartproxy account management API resources

account.description: A Smartproxy primary account with authentication and subscriptions

subscription.description: A single subscription plan with traffic limits and validity dates

sub-users.description: Proxy sub-user accounts for traffic isolation and access control

sub-user.description: A proxy user account with its own credentials and traffic allocation

traffic.description: Traffic usage metrics for this sub-user

whitelisted-ips.description: IP addresses allowed to authenticate with proxies without credentials

whitelisted-ip.description: A single whitelisted IP address record

endpoints.description: Available proxy server endpoints for connection

endpoint.description: A proxy server endpoint with connection details
